description_long: This is a rustic log cabin with a steeply pitched gable roof made of weathered wooden shingles. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontally stacked logs, giving the structure a traditional, hand-built appearance. The cabin sits on a rectangular grassy base, with a small set of steps leading up to a covered entryway at the front. There are minimal windows, and the overall design is simple and functional, emphasizing durability and shelter. The roof overhangs slightly, providing some protection to the entry area. The natural wood tones and rough textures evoke a sense of rural charm and historical craftsmanship.
description: A rustic log cabin with a steep gable roof, wooden log walls, and a small covered entryway, set on a grassy base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, the overhanging gable roof, and the log construction.
description_view_1: Side gable view highlighting the triangular roof profile and the solid log wall with no visible openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall of the cabin, the extended roof, and the log structure with minimal features.
description_view_3: View of the entry side with the covered porch area, visible doorway, and the log wall construction.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with steep pitch, constructed from wooden shingles, moderate overhangs
attribute_window_arrangement: Very few windows; only one small window is visible on the front facade, asymmetrically placed to the right of the door
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door centered on the front facade beneath the roof overhang
